name: task_submit_review
description:
Submit a human review decision for a task in needs-review status. Approve
merges the task worktree and transitions to done (after verification gates).
Reject discards the worktree, appends reviewer feedback to
extensions.review.feedback, and returns the task to todo for rework.

task_id.description: Canonical task ID (t_XXXXXXXX). Must be in needs-review status.

approved.description: True to approve and complete the task, false to reject and restart it.

comment.description: Reviewer comment — required when rejecting, optional when approving.

what_was_wrong.description: Specific description of what the implementation got wrong (used when rejecting to guide the next attempt).
